/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libmotor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/motor_interfaces/srv/detail/arm_pos__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/motor_interfaces/srv/detail/wheel_vel__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/waldo/ros2_ws/src/build/motor_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmotor_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
